data.name: Bhag Club
data.description: Bhag Club is a running community and activewear brand discovered through its official website and public Luma event pages. This Delhi-targeted profile is unclaimed on Catch; the Delhi city association is user-supplied until a stable Delhi-specific source is verified.

eventSuccess.hostGoal: Help runners connect through recurring community runs.

publicPage.seoTitle: Bhag Club | Delhi organizer profile | Catch
publicPage.seoDescription: Unclaimed Catch profile for Bhag Club, a running community and activewear brand. Delhi association remains user-supplied until public city evidence is verified.

publicProfile.headline: Bhag Club running community in Delhi
publicProfile.summary: Bhag Club appears to be both a running community and an activewear brand. Its official website describes weekly runs, training programs, and performance activewear; this Delhi-targeted Catch profile remains unclaimed and noindexed until a stable Delhi-specific source is verified.
publicProfile.sourceSummary: The official Bhag site confirms the brand/community positioning. A public Luma event page confirms a BHAG RUNS calendar and Bhag Club host profile with a Gurgaon event, but not a Delhi-specific event in this pass.

facts.label: City evidence
facts.value: Delhi is user-supplied; Gurgaon event evidence found

facts.label: Indexing
facts.value: Noindex until Delhi evidence is verified

fitNotes: BHAG shows why the entity model needs to cover brands and organizers, not only clubs.
The Luma event includes registration questions, consent, emergency contact, and attendance intent, which maps to Catch's host onboarding and event policy surfaces.
The official website combines commerce and community; organizer profiles need to model external websites and source-backed event evidence separately from Catch events.
missingEvidence: Preferred business contact for the organizer
Whether Bhag Club should be represented as one national brand or separate city chapters

eventEvidence.title: Bhag GGN
eventEvidence.summary: The public Luma page lists a Bhag Club-hosted Gurgaon run from Espressos AnyDay with a 3KM distance and free general admission.
facts: Hosted by Bhag Club under the BHAG RUNS calendar
Event location is Gurugram, not Delhi
Registration questions include Instagram, age, gender, emergency contact, attendance intent, and consent
Embedded host data lists website thebhag.in and social handle bhagclub
